category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line tool for managing Xcode projects; official GitHub README describes Xcode project management and Swift implementation
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README heading use XcodeProjectCLI; executable/package name is xcp
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and contains installation, usage, subcommands, and library examples
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a non-empty value, so repo is returned as null per instructions
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Swift command-line Xcode project manager; official GitHub topics include swift, cli, xcode, and xcodeproj
